textByHash.016df8a32027926ea62dfd0a4fdee3418563357a: It would be! I'm sure he'll he happy to share some information with you.
textByHash.19b0d6fb862ff495a18b0d92b205d9a268808a3e: Ah, your inventory is full. Can you make some room?
textByHash.1c2c6d63eb46deec3faa5265383dc5395a1a6a23: Hiya, did you need something else from me?
textByHash.21fdc87e9da5eff0e70b197eb36f72aa31c6ac14: You want me to drink a vial of mysterious liquid?
textByHash.2aa81280511a634d023c93c5028914c96acddc3b: There are a couple very near, in this field.
textByHash.2d9e5799c8a27bfaefab2120438790ebc68c2cc5: Were you thinking of being a competitor to us then?
textByHash.2da03e93097fb3ed7cf7469a2281a2daa9d018da: Now that you mention it, I've had an incredibly aggressive bull disrupting my herd lately. I've got him caught in the pen over there.
textByHash.3319e324ca2337fee0f1a5d251dc0a70ce7abbee: Come to think of it, I'm sure my father keeps a few tricks up his sleeve. Why don't you go and ask him?
textByHash.38fb4681830ec85f16fc3891584e01b520d22d57: Oh? What happened in that field?
textByHash.3f82c3ce6e4eaa884a93993bb5407f4a2e6d4ead: They are easy to spot - they are dark brown and white, unlike beef cows, which are light brown and white. We also tether them to a post to stop them wandering around all over the place.
textByHash.4220290ff70c8ffa00485751d62a3a733ba02dcb: I'm afraid not. We need all of our milk to sell to market, but you can milk the cow yourself if you need the milk.
textByHash.4bd9d934fb59c42c2b8fcc6d39f30abf3463b6cf: However, I wonder if I'd be doing a public service by protecting anyone else from it.
textByHash.4f6dd23e5c0b14b0a93d297dbe15972074919c8b: And, if you haven't yet spoken to Cassius, you should probably let him know what's transpired.
textByHash.599abd8c4c1d1b0f3a6072904f1944e86efe4f59: Why don't you go and talk to him about it! He may appreciate knowing the Brutus was bad for business.
textByHash.5a5e1511d307fec4bed96e42aac9eb501503fca5: How are you getting on with the bull?
textByHash.6235d4f853b2b22174d0f33dc7767873b9f0ba8c: Hello, I'm Gillie the Milkmaid. What can I do for you?
textByHash.6b43f4e23f237a3ac1048f27bcd5e0326d672e13: Perhaps you'd be interested in dealing with him? I'd owe you a fairly large favour.
textByHash.779a42f29e05611668275438f02bf2bc835b4088: You succeeded! I'll let the Duke know that you're all good to start a milk business.
textByHash.7d63889f3a73e6bfe2c685a3ebfa5ebdedc57715: Then find a dairy cow to milk - you can't milk just any cow.
textByHash.7fc0fdd89240ef5400025934e48c2214d2a64e65: Have you tried that milk sample yet?
textByHash.83ef6d11e30f27ec009b09300f4ff0c1a2bde6d2: That's good. You must be ready to care for your own cows at this point!
textByHash.877c745bd275b272681bfd3e0133bbbc39d0ecac: That looked like a horrible experience.
textByHash.8d86456f38a7c521c0e34f92b6a5145971626dbd: I'm always glad that adventurers come by and help with milking them. I wouldn't be able to keep up otherwise.
textByHash.8dc9c60cbc1dc5cbffbbc76fe902898bc41f0ac1: One of our local milk enjoyers gave us some enchanted cow bells.
textByHash.95fc06b59936e3def0b1d18c9976e9cad9f50445: You think he's been stealing milk?
textByHash.9cef58d98a0125b6d9418d0150792f455af8e14a: The cows make the best milk when they're happy, and to be honest, they make too much!
textByHash.9d97e8839818d05e8e4bacf30bef3a162e954740: My name is Gillie Groats. My father is a farmer and I milk the cows for him.
textByHash.9f2e9b9e652f44804f604b480df589d0709c10bb: The Duke is a good man, directing you to me! I've been running the milk side of our farm for a while now.
textByHash.9fe83d030562b5e94fd42acc2a8d7e6ab9f62162: They seem to be quite versatile, enjoy!
textByHash.a28a17528046d3390150310594344fd6bcef603b: With how bad it looks, you wouldn't be any competition to us.
textByHash.a684ccf988dc1a9279cc5d330b2bb5e06fb454eb: It is just milk after all.
textByHash.acee5d1a94061747c735b6425e5a2b18de44b111: It definitely won't hurt your chances.
textByHash.b1a2b6b1b4370ad5ead8b7653d53fd6bb5a8121d: Then just milk the cow and your bucket will fill with tasty, nutritious milk.
textByHash.b7742a8ed75b0246e1a9a497554803f154d33f40: Where did you even get that milk?
textByHash.bd035001e8fe151ae1e70f34ac184685ea55a376: It's very easy. First you need an empty bucket to hold the milk.
textByHash.be5c84652c1518fe8580fa331bd667da0ebd3fe1: This is for helping out with that bull. Our cows are much happier these days.
textByHash.be77a31dbc41eeabc32a80a5b21357da93199540: Thank you once again for handling Brutus, he was causing quite a problem for my herd.
textByHash.c48063fcb2da807a4a7fff229266e03dc7c6beb2: I wonder if his aggression is why Cassius' herd are producing such bad milk...
textByHash.c507e5a292c472086c318e3781aa66b242ba3ffd: Cassius... I don't recognise the name. He's not mentioned anything about its source?
textByHash.cb6074c062cabd11f273251cfeac2ad6db54a36f: No, I think you should drink it, I'll know the quality of it from your reaction.
textByHash.cf3976d61344e13a02691df16f6a6b0ce4229f90: That bull was one of the business partners?
textByHash.e8755fc18830fa46da45cbe6b98e1fb16a02ee57: Oh, just the person I wanted to see! I have something for you.
textByHash.eb6068c99b3ce2345e481b770103a50cbb308138: I also have this for you!
textByHash.ecf6541afd69bfaf542866ba363571c5f23a57be: I also have something else for you but your inventory is full. Can you make some room?
